content: Very respectful memorial to those from Washington making the ultimate sacrifice on our behalf. Well worth a visit if you are in the area. It's free.

title: Garden of Remembrance - Honoring Our Fallen Heroes
content: A PLACE OF HONOR, REFLECTION, AND RENEWAL. ## MEMORIAL DAY CEREMONY Monday, May 25, 2026,10:00 AM at the Garden of Remembrance 200 University Street, Seattle, WA. The Seattle **Garden of Remembrance** is a memorial dedicated to honoring Washington State residents who gave their lives in overseas service, from World War II to present-day. Dedicated in 1998 in downtown Seattle, the Garden offers an urban oasis of beauty and reflection. “The Garden’s purpose is not to be a place to grieve or mourn. It is meant to be a place of renewal, of peace, and of celebration and thankfulness for the lives and love of those who lived among us for so short a time.”. * For over 25 years, the Garden of Remembrance has stood as a sacred place to honor Washington State’s fallen service members, combining artful design with meaningful details. The Garden of Remembrance is located in downtown Seattle at:.
